heading: Transferred
label: 61h–5 Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 61h–5 was editorially reclassified as .section 6132 of this title

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 61h–5, , , , authorizing the Majority Leader and the Minority Leader to appoint, respectively, an Assistant to the Majority Leader for Floor Operations and an Assistant to the Minority Leader for Floor Operations, was omitted in view of , title I, , , which provided that effective , the positions of Assistant to the Majority Leader for Floor Operations and Assistant to the Minority Leader for Floor Operations established by the Supplemental Appropriations Act, 1977 () were abolished.Pub.
